title: manifest: `rm` should not remove referenced images.
body:
Following PR makes sure that `podman manifest rm <list>` only removes
the named manifest list and not referenced images.

Bumping and squashing c/common to `v0.43.3-0.20210902095222-a7acc160fb25` as a dependency
in same commit in order to make sure build commit test passes.

Linked issue: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/11344

comments.body:
/lgtm
Could we add an option --all which would remove the manifest and all of the images.
